# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of DNS Forge is supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.9.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.9.0 | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please report it privately via GitHub's "Report a security vulnerability" feature in the **Security** tab. 

You can also submit a report directly through our [Security Advisories](https://github.com/DNS-Forge/firefox-addon/security/advisories) page.

We take all security reports seriously. You can expect a response within 48 hours and a follow-up with a proposed timeline for a fix if the vulnerability is confirmed.

---
**Thank you for helping keep DNS Forge safe!**
